author: Mechefvector
description: A lightweight local 3D model viewer for STL, OBJ, and 3MF with automatic centering and no grid, axes, or shadows. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Mechefvector
manifest.description: A lightweight local 3D model viewer for STL, OBJ, and 3MF with automatic centering and no grid, axes, or shadows.
manifest.name: 3D Model Viewer

name: 3D Model Viewer

releases.author: dark72147
releases.description:
Initial public release.

Features:
- Preview STL, OBJ, and 3MF files in Obsidian notes.
- Open supported 3D model files directly in a custom viewer.
- Automatic model centering and scaling.
- Mouse drag rotation and wheel zoom.
- View cube for switching view direction.
- Command palette support for inserting viewer blocks.

Notes:
- STEP/STP files are CAD solid formats and should be converted to STL, OBJ, or 3MF first.
